layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with 2:1 width allocation (left column dominant). The slide uses a clean left-to-right reading flow with the Context section occupying approximately 65% of the slide width and the Objectives section occupying approximately 30%, separated by a consistent 5% gutter. Both columns share identical top and bottom edges, creating a unified horizontal band that fills the vertical space between the title area and the slide footer zone. The layout respects the user instruction to avoid icons and applies a professional two-column template structure. All content is distributed vertically within each column using equal-height row sections separated by thin dashed grey separator lines to create visual rhythm without consuming excessive vertical space. The design follows Section 6 Option B (Bullet Ornaments) for the Context column and Section 6 Option D (Numbered Badge List) for the Objectives column, adapted to fit the two-column constraint.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 2
  Allocation: [0.65, 0.3]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — CONTEXT SECTION): The Context section occupies the left two-thirds of the slide width (approximately 65%). It begins with a bold section header 'Context' in brand primary color, followed immediately by a thin solid horizontal line in brand dark color spanning the full column width. Below the header, the content is organized into vertically distributed row sections with equal flexGrow values to fill the available column height evenly. Each major content block (the 2024/2025 business stand-up paragraph, the 2026 scaling initiatives with sub-bullets, the ATLAS technology solution description, the workflow tool progress update, and the today's agenda statement) is treated as a distinct row section. Between consecutive row sections, thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines span the full column width to create visual rhythm and section boundaries. The text uses body font in brand text color, left-aligned with a small left inset. Key phrases that are bolded in the source content (e.g., '2024/2025', 'began the stand-up of our Liquidity Solutions business', '$250-300M of value creation by 2030', 'continuing to scale the business', 'Liquidity Solution fund', 'investments', 'team with a few more additions', 'infrastructure to be able to support the business as it scales', 'begun building a technology solution (ATLAS)', 'working closely with Antares technology and NimbleGravity', 'pipeline report', 'Borrower one-pagers', 'portfolio management capability', 'reference this infrastructure', 'critical for the fundraising', 'share the outcome of ATLAS Phase 1', 'Phase 2', 'discuss funding required') retain their bold styling to preserve the source content's emphasis hierarchy. Sub-bullet items under the 2026 section are rendered as a nested bullet list with small brand-color circle bullet markers, indented slightly from the parent text. The column has generous top and bottom padding to prevent content from crowding the title area above or the slide footer zone below. The column's left edge aligns with the slide's safe-area margin (approximately 5% from the left slide edge). The column's right edge is positioned at approximately 67% of the slide width, leaving a 3% gutter before the Objectives column begins.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — OBJECTIVES SECTION): The Objectives section occupies the right third of the slide width (approximately 30%). It begins with a bold section header 'Objectives' in brand primary color, followed immediately by a thin solid horizontal line in brand dark color spanning the full column width. Below the header, the three numbered objectives are organized as vertically distributed row sections with equal flexGrow values to fill the available column height evenly. Each objective row contains a small filled square badge (brand primary color, small corner radius, white bold enumeration number '1', '2', '3' centered inside) positioned at the left edge of the row and vertically centered. The badge is proportional to the body text height — small enough to guide the eye without dominating the row. To the right of each badge, the objective text is left-aligned and vertically centered relative to the badge. The text uses body font in brand text color. Key phrases that are bolded in the source content ('Review outcomes from ATLAS Phase 1', 'Demo ATLAS Phase 1 solution', 'discuss funding requirements for ATLAS Phase 2') retain their bold styling, while the time allocations in brackets and supporting phrases remain in regular weight. Between consecutive objective rows (not after the last row), thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines span the full column width, positioned at the midpoint between two row centers. The column has generous top and bottom padding matching the Context column to ensure both columns share identical top and bottom edges. The column's left edge is positioned at approximately 70% of the slide width (3% gutter after the Context column ends). The column's right edge aligns with the slide's safe-area margin (approximately 5% from the right slide edge). The yellow sticky note annotation from the source slide ('@ponmalar: please put this page into a 2/3 and 1/3 template (no icons)') is removed entirely — it is an editorial instruction, not slide content.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Not active. The slide is well-filled by the two content columns, and no visual grouping benefit would be added by a bottom decorative layer. The two-column structure is self-evident from the alignment and gutter spacing, and does not require a unifying background shape.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Not active. No connectors, arrows, or cross-container elements are needed. The two columns are independent content sections with no visual links between them.
